# Custom Agents

This file documents custom agents available for this project.

## Verify Agent

**Command**: `/verify`

**Purpose**: Autonomous verification and testing of Flutter app functionality

**When to use**:
- Verify that your code changes work correctly
- Test new features before deployment
- Run automated test suites
- Check integration between components
- Validate backend API connections
- Generate test coverage reports

**The agent will**:
- Run `flutter test` to execute your test suite
- Create unit tests, widget tests, or integration tests
- Analyze test coverage
- Identify and report bugs
- Suggest fixes for failed tests

**Example usage**: "Verify that the speech-to-text integration works correctly"
